name: frihet-mcp
title: Frihet ERP
description: AI-native MCP server for business management. 157 tools: invoices, expenses, clients, CRM, quotes, deposits, banking, fiscal (Modelo 303/130/390/180/347/415/425/418), e-invoicing (Facturae/XRechnung/Factur-X/FatturaPA/PEPPOL/FACe/TicketBAI/KSeF), VeriFactu, IGIC/AIEM, corporate tax (M200/M202), GL audit, portal domain, VIES, POS, vacation rentals, time tracking, HR, payroll, onboarding, period close, gestoria. Zero install via remote endpoint at mcp.frihet.io. Supports Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline, Codex.
